tasks.title: EP-A Data Model v2 + Compatibility Layer
tasks.description: Define DeckSpec v2 and SlideSpec v2, including legacy mapping from v1 fields. Acceptance: existing v1 flows still run under feature flag off.

tasks.title: ST-A1 Create DeckSpec v2 persistence + load by selectors
tasks.description: Persist deckId, initiativeId, buyerId, deckType, template theme, providers, savepoint pointer. Acceptance: deck loads by initiativeId/deckType/buyerId.

tasks.title: ST-A2 Upgrade SlideSpec to slot-aware v2
tasks.description: Add templateId, slots, constraints, imagePlans, qa, pipeline fields. Map legacy title/bullets/imagePrompt/layout into slots/templateId.

tasks.title: EP-B Presentation Studio API Surface (Phase 1)
tasks.description: Implement minimal deck/slides/templates/savepoints/pipeline status routes for v2.

tasks.title: ST-B1 Add Deck APIs (GET/POST/PATCH)
tasks.description: Create/read/update deck metadata and current save point. Acceptance: selector-driven load works from UI.

tasks.title: ST-B2 Add Slides APIs (list/get/create/update/delete)
tasks.description: CRUD slide specs in deck order with re-render hooks. Acceptance: single-slide update without full regen.

tasks.title: EP-C Template Library + Assignment
tasks.description: Ship canonical templates with slot schemas and API reads.

tasks.title: ST-C1 Define 8 canonical templates + slots schema
tasks.description: cover-hero, two-col-bullets, feature-grid, layered-diagram, flywheel, comparison-matrix, timeline, closing-cta.

tasks.title: EP-D Save Points + Restore
tasks.description: Create/list/restore save points with frozen DeckSpec/SlideSpecs and render refs.

tasks.title: EP-E Studio UI v2 Shell (feature-flagged)
tasks.description: Add DeckContextBar, ModePanel (AI Slides/Team Chat), Source/QA tabs and bottom command bar while preserving v1 paths.

tasks.title: EP-F Pipeline Status + AI Edit loop
tasks.description: Enable slide/deck run + status polling + targeted instruction application (critique->rewrite->render->qa).

tasks.title: EP-G Signal Register v1 for pressure tracking
tasks.description: Track Monitor/Verified/Actioned signals with sources, confidence, buyer/initiative links, and deck handoff hook.

tasks.title: US-A1 As an editor, I can load a deck by initiative/deck selectors
tasks.description: Story under EP-A: selector-based deck retrieval returns a stable DeckSpec v2 object.

tasks.title: TS-A1.1 Create DeckSpec v2 schema + defaults
tasks.description: Define deckId, initiativeId, buyerId, deckType, theme, providers, slideOrder, savepoint pointer.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Implemented DeckSpec v2 schema + default store scaffolding in admin server. Added schema/data files bootstrap at startup.

tasks.title: TS-A1.2 Implement deck resolver by selectors
tasks.description: Load/create DeckSpec using initiativeId+deckType+buyerId; preserve v1 fallback behavior.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Implemented selector resolver helpers and deck auto-create path; added /api/presentation-studio/decks/resolve endpoint.

tasks.title: US-A2 As an editor, I can edit legacy slide fields without breaking v2
tasks.description: Story under EP-A: legacy title/bullets/imagePrompt map safely into SlideSpec v2 slots/templateId.

tasks.title: TS-A2.1 Add SlideSpec v2 mapper (legacy->slots)
tasks.description: Implement mapping layout->templateId and legacy fields to slots structure.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Decomposed into TASK-0045 and TASK-0046 for atomic delivery.

tasks.title: TS-A2.2 Persist pipeline/qa/render metadata on slide records
tasks.description: Add pipeline stage state, qa flags/score, rendered refs; keep optional for old slides.

tasks.title: US-B1 As a user, I can manage deck records via API
tasks.description: Story under EP-B: create/get/update deck metadata via presentation-studio endpoints.

tasks.title: TS-B1.1 Implement GET/POST /api/presentation-studio/decks
tasks.description: Add list/create with selector filters and validation.

tasks.title: TS-B1.2 Implement PATCH /api/presentation-studio/decks/{deckId}
tasks.description: Update styleMode/providers/globalTemplateTheme/currentSavePointId.

tasks.title: US-B2 As a user, I can CRUD slides in a deck via API
tasks.description: Story under EP-B: slide-level operations support add/edit/delete without full regen.

tasks.title: TS-B2.1 Implement slide list/get endpoints
tasks.description: GET deck slides + GET single slide by slideId.

tasks.title: TS-B2.2 Implement slide create/update/delete endpoints
tasks.description: POST/PATCH/DELETE slide endpoints with order maintenance.

tasks.title: US-B3 As a user, I can fetch templates and savepoints via API
tasks.description: Story under EP-B: template list/detail and savepoint list/create/restore endpoints available.

tasks.title: TS-B3.1 Implement template list/detail endpoints
tasks.description: GET /templates and /templates/{templateId}.

tasks.title: TS-B3.2 Implement savepoint list/create/restore endpoints
tasks.description: GET/POST savepoints and POST restore by savePointId.

tasks.title: US-UI1 Replace board edit modal with persistent right-side detail panel
tasks.description: Swap modal editing for a non-blocking side panel with full task fields (title, description, acceptance, tags, links, comments, status, owner, priority) and inline save actions.

tasks.title: TS-UI1.1 Implement board task detail drawer component + route/state binding
tasks.description: Add right-side drawer panel opened by task click; preserve board context; support keyboard close and mobile collapse.

tasks.title: TS-UI1.2 Wire drawer form fields to existing task update APIs + validation
tasks.description: Bind all editable fields and save actions; keep audit logging and governance checks unchanged.

tasks.title: US-A3 Pipeline Engine (slide + deck runs)
tasks.description: Acceptance: run by scope, stage status persisted, QA updated after run. Dependencies: US-A1, US-A2.

tasks.title: TS-A3.1 Implement pipeline run endpoint with persisted runId
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/presentation-studio/decks/{deckId}/pipeline/run with stages plan,draft,critique,rewrite,render,qa; scope deck|slide.

tasks.title: US-A4 SavePoint versioning and restore
tasks.description: Acceptance: create/list/restore savepoints; restore updates preview atomically.

tasks.title: TS-A4.1 Implement savepoint create/list/restore APIs
tasks.description: POST/GET savepoints and POST restore; immutable snapshot refs for DeckSpec+SlideSpec+render.

tasks.title: US-B1 AI Slides mode panel and instruction loop
tasks.description: Acceptance: AI Slides tab visible, instruction input triggers pipeline, styleMode persists.

tasks.title: TS-B1.1 Add AI command input + style toggle wiring
tasks.description: Route instruction to pipeline run; persist DeckSpec.styleMode professional|creative.

tasks.title: US-B2 Team Chat per deck
tasks.description: Acceptance: chat messages persist per deck and support optional slide references.

tasks.title: TS-B2.1 Implement TeamChatThread model + message APIs
tasks.description: GET chat thread and POST chat messages scoped to deckId; include optional slideId.

tasks.title: TS-API.1 Implement templates endpoint and validation
tasks.description: GET /api/presentation-studio/templates returns >=8 templates with slotsSchema and constraintsDefaults; reject invalid templateId assignments.

tasks.title: TS-QA.1 Enforce QA blocking flags on export/publish
tasks.description: Block export when OVERFLOW or INCONSISTENT_HEADER flags exist; add auto-fix trigger.

tasks.title: EP-H Pipeline Run Endpoint Hardening
tasks.description: Decompose TS-A3.1 into atomic steps before implementation to avoid oversized changes.

tasks.title: US-H1 Validate request contract for pipeline run
tasks.description: Define and enforce scope/stages/slideId validation for pipeline run endpoint.

tasks.title: TS-H1.1 Implement POST /pipeline/run request validation + runId creation
tasks.description: Create atomic first slice: validate input + create persisted run record with started status.

tasks.title: TS-H1.2 Persist per-stage status transitions
tasks.description: Add stage-by-stage status persistence (plan/draft/critique/rewrite/render/qa).

tasks.title: TS-A2.1a Map legacy layout -> templateId with fallback rules
tasks.description: Add deterministic mapping from legacy layout values to templateId. Include fallback when layout missing/unknown.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Further decomposed into TASK-0047/0048/0049 for atomic execution.

tasks.title: TS-A2.1b Map legacy title/bullets/imagePrompt -> SlideSpec v2 slots
tasks.description: Map legacy fields into slots object and persist compatibly; include mapper tests/validation checks.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Decomposed into TASK-0050/0051/0052 for atomic implementation and testability.

tasks.title: TS-A2.1a.1 Define legacy layout -> templateId mapping table
tasks.description: Create deterministic mapping dictionary for legacy layouts (title/section/proof/diagram/close) to v2 template IDs.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Added legacy layout->templateId mapping table and mapper helper; exposed read-only mapping endpoint for validation.

tasks.title: TS-A2.1a.2 Implement fallback resolver for missing/unknown layouts
tasks.description: If legacy layout missing or unknown, resolve to safe default templateId and mark normalization note for compatibility.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Added fallback resolver for missing/unknown layouts with safe default template and metadata (fallbackApplied/note).

tasks.title: TS-A2.1a.3 Wire mapper integration path + smoke test
tasks.description: Hook layout mapper into slide normalization flow and verify mapped templateId appears in generated/loaded SlideSpec records.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Integrated layout->template mapping into slide update flow and added normalize-layout endpoint for deck smoke normalization.

tasks.title: TS-A2.1b.1 Define SlideSpec v2 slot schema + mapper contract
tasks.description: Define minimal canonical slots object (headline, bullets, imageSlots) and a deterministic mapper contract from legacy fields.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Defined v2 slot schema constant and legacy->slots mapper contract function; exposed contract endpoint for validation.

tasks.title: TS-A2.1b.2 Implement legacy title/bullets/imagePrompt -> slots mapper
tasks.description: Map legacy title, bullets, and image prompt into slots while preserving existing fields for backward compatibility.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Implemented legacy title/bullets/imagePrompt -> slots mapping in slide update flow; preserves legacy fields.

tasks.title: TS-A2.1b.3 Persist slot normalization + add smoke verify endpoint
tasks.description: Persist slots in deck slide records and expose a smoke endpoint to verify normalized slot output on a selected deck/slide.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Persisted slot normalization in normalize endpoint and added slots-preview smoke endpoint.

tasks.title: EP-SBP Sponsor-Level Presence (Beacon — passive gravity)
tasks.description: Build a low-volume, high-density beacon system that encodes structural signaling only (no marketing posture).

tasks.title: US-SBP1 Beacon doctrine and hard rules enforced
tasks.description: Codify Beacon operating doctrine incl. Rule A (no future-tense authority claims) and Rule B (no embedded mandate offers).

tasks.title: TS-SBP1.1 Create Beacon Doctrine spec + examples
tasks.description: Write doctrine artifact with allowed/disallowed patterns, examples of weak vs structural sentences, and review gate criteria.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Doctrine created at mission-control/beacon/DOCTRINE.md with Rule A/B, allowed/disallowed patterns, examples, and approval gate criteria.

tasks.title: TS-SBP1.2 Implement lint guardrails for Rule A/Rule B
tasks.description: Add deterministic lint checks that auto-reject drafts containing authority claims or mandate-offer language.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Implemented lint rules + script + usage docs + pass/reject examples for Rule A/B guardrails.

tasks.title: US-SBP2 Weekly beacon pipeline (signal -> draft -> approve -> publish)
tasks.description: Create workflow that drafts one beacon per week from live friction signals and requires approval before publish.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.1 Add beacon queue data model
tasks.description: Create data structure for beacon queue items with linked signal, initiative, status, owner, and publish date.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Decomposed into atomic subtasks for <60 min execution units.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.2 Add board tasks template for weekly beacon cycle
tasks.description: Template tasks: select friction, draft, harden, approve, publish (no CTA).

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Decomposed into atomic subtasks for <60 min execution units.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.3 Add approval gate (architect only)
tasks.description: Ensure publish state requires architect approval and logs immutable activity event.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Decomposed into atomic subtasks for <60 min execution units.

tasks.title: US-SBP3 First 4 beacons drafted from live signals
tasks.description: Produce four high-density structural beacons tied to live buyer friction events.

tasks.title: TS-SBP3.1 Draft beacon #1: FID stalls despite approved capital
tasks.description: One-sentence structural framing + 80-120 word micro-brief, no CTA, no authority claims.

tasks.title: TS-SBP3.2 Draft beacon #2: downside absorber ambiguity
tasks.description: Structural risk framing only; validate against lint gate.

tasks.title: TS-SBP3.3 Draft beacon #3: sequencing failure before FID
tasks.description: Structural sequencing framing only; validate against lint gate.

tasks.title: TS-SBP3.4 Draft beacon #4: promote timing as architecture signal
tasks.description: Architecture signal framing only; validate against lint gate.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.1a Create beacon queue schema and storage file
tasks.description: Define beacons queue fields/status enum and initialize mission-control/beacon/beacons.json store.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.1b Add beacon create endpoint + validation
tasks.description: Implement API to create beacon draft records with schema validation.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Added /api/beacons create endpoint with basic validation + queue persistence + audit event.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.1c Enforce required signal/initiative/mandate linkage
tasks.description: Block submission unless signal_id, initiative_id, mandate_implication are present.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.3a Add beacon status transition endpoint
tasks.description: Create transition endpoint for draft->harden->review->approved->published/hold.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.3b Enforce architect-only approval + audit events
tasks.description: Require architect for approval/publish transitions and write immutable activity events.

tasks.title: TS-SBP1.2-L1 Add banned soft-term dictionary
tasks.description: Add soft-term reject list: innovation/coordination/transformation/generic optimism.

tasks.title: TS-SBP1.2-L2 Add required hard-term checker
tasks.description: Require hard terms: FID boundary, downside absorption, governance jurisdiction, capital stack sequencing.

tasks.title: TS-SBP1.2-L3 Add lint fixtures for soft/hard-term enforcement
tasks.description: Add pass/fail fixtures and update readme examples for expanded lint policy.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.2a Build weekly beacon board template
tasks.description: Create recurring Mon-Fri template tasks tied to one beacon per week.

tasks.title: TS-SBP2.2b Add cadence runbook documentation
tasks.description: Document weekly operating cadence and handoff rules.
